nodes.name: Poll Post Meeting Follow Up Leads

parameters.query: =SELECT Id, Name, Email, OwnerId, Status, Engagement_Status__c, IsConverted, Human_Override__c FROM Lead WHERE Engagement_Status__c = 'Post Meeting Follow Up' AND IsConverted = false AND IsDeleted = false AND Status NOT IN ('Unqualified','Closed','Disqualified') AND (Human_Override__c = false OR Human_Override__c = null) ORDER BY LastModifiedDate ASC LIMIT 100

nodes.name: Fetch Post Meeting Follow Up Leads

additionalFields.description:
={{ $json.taskNotes + '

Lead: ' + $json.leadName + '
Sequence Step: ' + $json.stepKey + '
Workflow: W14 - Post Meeting Follow Up Task Sequence' }}
additionalFields.subject: ={{ $json.taskSubject }}

main.node: Fetch Post Meeting Follow Up Leads
